Package coxprogramming.processing.sprites

Class Blob

Object
Sprite
Blob
Direct Known Subclasses:
Block
public class Blob extends Sprite
A circular sprite with a color and a radius.

Blob is the simplest concrete sprite â€” it draws itself as a filled circle and can detect when it bumps into another Blob. It extends Sprite, so it inherits all of the movement and keyboard/mouse-control methods.

Example: 

   Blob ball = new Blob(this, 200, 300, 25, color(255, 0, 0));
   // Creates a red circle of radius 25 at (200, 300).

  • Field Details

    • radius

      protected float radius
      The radius of the circle in pixels.

    • myColor

      protected int myColor

  • Constructor Details

    • Blob

      public Blob(PApplet parent, float x, float y, float r, int c)
      Creates a stationary Blob at position (x, y).
      Parameters:
      parent - your Processing sketch â€” pass this
      x - the starting x position (center of the circle)
      y - the starting y position (center of the circle)
      r - the radius of the circle in pixels
      c - the fill color â€” use Processing's color() function

    • Blob

      public Blob(PApplet parent, float x, float y, float r, float dx, float dy, int c)
      Creates a moving Blob at position (x, y) with a given velocity.
      Parameters:
      parent - your Processing sketch â€” pass this
      x - the starting x position (center of the circle)
      y - the starting y position (center of the circle)
      r - the radius of the circle in pixels
      dx - horizontal velocity in pixels per frame (positive = right)
      dy - vertical velocity in pixels per frame (positive = down)
      c - the fill color â€” use Processing's color() function

  • Method Details

    • collidesWith

      public boolean collidesWith(Blob other)
      Checks whether this Blob is touching another Blob. Two circles are touching when the distance between their centers is less than or equal to the sum of their radii.
      Parameters:
      other - the other Blob to check against
      Returns:
      true if the two Blobs overlap or touch, false otherwise

    • drawSprite

      public void drawSprite()
      Draws this Blob as a filled circle centered at its current position. Call this once per frame inside your draw() loop.
      Specified by:
      drawSprite in class Sprite
